capture_note: Wave 5 attempted native browser capture through Edge, Playwright CLI and Windows screenshot helpers. All native routes were blocked in this environment, so the committed artifact is an auditable report built from the live served UI plus the concrete native-capture failures.

native_attempts.error_excerpt: ProcessSingleton lock file can not be created; Edge aborted before opening a usable browser window.
Playwright screenshot failed with spawn EPERM while launching chrome-headless-shell.exe.
take_screenshot.ps1 failed to get active-window bounds because no usable browser window handle was available.
take_screenshot.ps1 failed with CopyFromScreen invalid handle on this session.
